summary: BlendLink LIVE Stripe payment critical fixes verified successfully. All 11 backend API tests pass (100%). UI verification confirms Wallet page shows 'Live' badge, Subscriptions page displays all 4 tier cards with correct pricing, and Marketplace loads with product listings.

minor.issue: Intermittent 520 errors when loading social feed

bl_coins_checkout.details: POST /api/payments/stripe/bl-coins/checkout returns cs_live_* URL (starter tier: $4.99 for 30,000 coins)

orders_checkout_stripe_redirect.details: POST /api/orders/checkout returns cs_live_* payment_url, NOT fallback to pending_payment

stripe_connect_onboard.details: POST /api/payments/stripe/connect/onboard returns valid Stripe Connect URL

member_pages_create.details: POST /api/member-pages/ successfully creates page - no 401 error (JWT_SECRET fixed)

subscriptions_tiers.details: GET /api/subscriptions/tiers returns all tier data (Free, Bronze, Silver, Gold, Diamond)

wallet_page.details: Wallet page loads with 'Live' badge visible in top-right corner, displays BL coins balance (100B+)

subscriptions_page.details: Memberships page displays all 4 tier cards: Bronze $4.99/month, Silver $9.99/month, Gold $14.99/month, Diamond $29.99/month

marketplace_page.details: Marketplace loads with product listings, 'Add to Cart' buttons functional

live_stripe_keys_hardcoded.verification: All checkout endpoints return cs_live_* session IDs

marketplace_checkout_not_bypassing_strip.details: POST /api/orders/checkout returns payment_url with checkout.stripe.com, not falling back to pending_payment

member_page_401_fixed.details: JWT_SECRET in member_pages_system.py now correctly defaults to 'blendlink-jwt-secret-key-2024' (line 528)

stripe_connect_capabilities.details: Stripe Connect account creation includes card_payments capability (line 1250)

critical_code_review_comments: All Stripe payment files now correctly hardcode LIVE keys to prevent system env override
Dynamic origin URL detection in checkout redirect URLs works correctly for preview environment
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical Stripe LIVE mode payments verified working. cs_live_* session IDs confirmed for subscription checkout, BL coins checkout, and marketplace orders checkout. Wallet shows Live badge. Member page creation works without 401. BL_COINS_TIERS: starter=$4.99/30000 coins, popular=$9.99/80000, premium=$14.99/400000, ultimate=$29.99/1000000.
